name: ligolo-ng-bof
help: Ligolo-ng agent tunnel - connect back to a ligolo-ng proxy from a compromised host
long_help:
Usage:
  'connect <host:port>'              Connect via TCP+TLS to ligolo-ng proxy
  'connect ws://<host:port>'         Connect via WebSocket to ligolo-ng proxy
  'connect wss://<host:port>'        Connect via secure WebSocket to ligolo-ng proxy
  'list'                             List active tunnel tasks
  'stop <taskId>'                    Stop a running tunnel task

Connect Options:
  --ignore-cert                      Skip TLS certificate verification
  --accept-fingerprint <hex>         Accept cert matching this SHA256 fingerprint
  --proxy <url>                      Upstream SOCKS5 proxy (socks5://host:port)

Examples:
  ligolo connect 10.10.10.5:11601
  ligolo connect wss://10.10.10.5:443 --ignore-cert
  ligolo list
  ligolo stop 0
